positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized illustration of a howling wolf silhouetted against a cosmic, deep teal and navy blue night sky. The wolf and surrounding forest elements are rendered in a bold, clean, geometric vector art style, mixed with subtle engraved woodcut linework. Include abstract, bioluminescent flora and stylized constellations connecting the scene. The overall composition must have strong central focus and high contrast (deep blacks against glowing cyan and gold accents). Suitable for a minimalist, single-color apparel print, flat matte finish, graphic novel aesthetic, intricate line work, perfectly clean edges, 8k illustration.
negative: blurry, ugly, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, disfigured, watermark, signature, text, logo, artifacts, extra limbs, cropped, low detail, out of focus, grain, noise, photorealism, messy, gradient shading
